# Dongsik Yoon — AI Engineer

> Portfolio of Dongsik Yoon (윤동식), AI Engineer — AI-driven image/video processing. Publications, patents, and project case studies (HDC LABS: fire detection, elevator situation analysis, IP/research).

## Pages
- [Home](https://stillrot.github.io/): Profile, career overview, and tabbed publications / patents / news / research
- [Career — HDC LABS](https://stillrot.github.io/career/hdclabs/): Work & Activities timeline + fire / elevator / IP project deep-dives
- [Career — Metaverse Entertainment](https://stillrot.github.io/career/metaent/): TD Team, AI Part
- [Career — Korea University](https://stillrot.github.io/career/ku/): M.S. in Electrical Engineering
- [Career — Baekseok University](https://stillrot.github.io/career/bu/): B.S. in Multimedia Engineering
- [CV](https://stillrot.github.io/cv/): Curriculum vitae
- [Portfolio Deck (2026)](https://stillrot.github.io/portfolio2026/): Slide-deck narrative of the projects and research

## Full content
- [llms-full.txt](https://stillrot.github.io/llms-full.txt): the entire site content + data in one plain-text file (best for feeding to an LLM)
